name: brand-system
description: Build a canonical, brand-agnostic, output-agnostic brand source for any brand, plus a real prototype, a /design-sync-ready component library, and a single attachable keystone .md an AI can think, speak, and design as the brand. brand-canon-builder analyzes, extracts assets, and builds the canon in Claude Code (filesystem + git); brand-canon-scoper scopes a brand in chat and compiles a ready-to-paste handoff for the builder.
